title: Coast Guard Calls Off Search for Crew of Capsized Cargo Ship
summary_full: The Mariana, a 145-foot vessel with six crew members, was found overturned after a typhoon, prompting an 11-day search which found no survivors.
summary_public: The Mariana, a 145-foot vessel with six crew members, was found overturned after a typhoon, prompting an 11-day search which found no survivors.
